name: itk-dev-shared-components

metadata.name: itk-dev-shared-components
metadata.summary: Shared components to use in RPA projects

documentation:
# itk-dev-shared-components

## Links

[Documentation](https://itk-dev-rpa.github.io/itk-dev-shared-components-docs/)

[Pypi](https://pypi.org/project/ITK-dev-shared-components/)

## Installation

```
pip install itk-dev-shared-components
```

## Intro

This python library contains helper modules for RPA development.
It's based on the need of [ITK Dev](https://itk.aarhus.dk/), but it has been
generalized to be useful for others as well.

## Integrations

### SAP Gui

Helper functions for using SAP Gui. A few examples include:

- Login to SAP.
- Handling multiple sessions in multiple threads.
- Convenience functions for gridviews and trees.

### Microsoft Graph

Helper functions for using Microsoft Graph to read emails from shared inboxes.
Some examples are:

- Authentication using username and password.
- List and get emails.
- Get attachment data.
- Move and delete emails.

### KMD Nova

Helper functions for using the KMD Nova api.
Some examples are:

- Get cases and documents.
- Create cases, documents and tasks.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_login
documentation: Module for logging into Eflyt/Daedalus/Whatchamacallit using Selenium

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_login.login
documentation:
Log into Eflyt using a password and username.

Args:
    username: Username for login.
    password: Password for login.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_util
documentation: General helper funtions

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_util.format_date
documentation: Format date as %d-%m-%Y

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case
documentation: Module for handling cases in eFlyt

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.get_beboere
documentation:
Get a list of current inhabitants on the case currently open.

Args:
    browser: The webdriver browser object.

Returns:
    A list of Inhabitants.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.get_room_count
documentation:
Get the number of rooms on the address.

Args:
    browser: The webdriver browser object.

Returns:
    The number of rooms on the address.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.get_applicants
documentation:
Get a list of applicants' cpr numbers from the applicant table.

Args:
    browser: The webdriver browser object.

Returns:
    A list of cpr numbers.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.change_tab
documentation:
Change the tab in the case view e.g. 'Sagslog', 'Breve'.

Args:
    browser: The webdriver browser object.
    tab_index: The zero-based index of the tab to select.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.approve_case
documentation:
Approve a case.
If any person on the case is blocking approval, approve each person individually.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.check_all_approved
documentation: Check all inhabiatants in table have a status 'Godkendt'.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.add_note
documentation: Add a note to a case.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.get_note_text
documentation: Read note text and close the window, returning the value.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.Case
documentation: A dataclass representing an Eflyt case.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.Inhabitant
documentation: A dataclass representing an inhabitant.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_case.Applicant
documentation: A dataclass representing an applicant.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_search
documentation: Interface for working with the 'Digital Flytning' section of Eflyt

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_search.search
documentation:
Apply the correct filters in Eflyt and search the case list.

Args:
    browser: The webdriver browser object.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_search.extract_cases
documentation:
Extract and filter cases from the case table. Requires a search to have been performed immediately before.

Args:
    browser: The webdriver browser object.

Returns:
    A list of filtered case objects.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.eflyt.eflyt_search.open_case
documentation:
Open a case by searching for its case number.

Args:
    browser: The webdriver browser object.
    case: The case to open.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.fmcacov
documentation: This module contains functions to help with actions in the fmcacov transaction.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.fmcacov.open_forretningspartner
documentation:
Start the transaction FMCACOV and open the given forretningspartner.
If the fp-number also matches a cvr-number the fp-number will be opened.

Args:
    session: The SAP session to perform the action.
    fp: The forretningspartner number.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the forretningspartner wasn't found.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.fmcacov.dismiss_key_popup
documentation:
Once a day a popup appears asking to generate a new "afstemningsnøgle".
This function forces it to appear and clicks "Ja" on it.
This is done by pretending to do "Kontovedligehold" on the given forretningspartner.
The function should start and end at the home screen.

Args:
    session: The SAP session object.
    fp: The forretningspartner to used. Defaults to "25564617" a fictional person in AAK.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If a popup other than the expected ones appear.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.smtp.smtp_util
documentation: This module contains a single function for sending emails using the SMTP protocol.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.smtp.smtp_util.send_email
documentation:
Send an email using the SMTP protocol.

Args:
    receiver: The email or list of emails to send the message to.
    sender: The sender email of the message.
    subject: The message subject.
    body: The message body.
    smtp_server: The name of the smtp server.
    smtp_port: The port of the smtp server.
    html_body: Wether the body is html or just plain text. Defaults to False.
    attachments: A list of Attachment objects. Defaults to None.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.smtp.smtp_util.EmailAttachment
documentation: A simple dataclass representing an email attachment.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.opret_kundekontakt
documentation: This module provides a single function to conveniently perform the action 'opret-kundekontaker' in SAP.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.opret_kundekontakt.opret_kundekontakter
documentation:
Creates a kundekontakt on the given FP and aftaler.

Args:
    session: The SAP session to preform the action.
    fp: The forretningspartner number.
    aftaler: A list of aftaler to put the kundekontakt on. If empty or None the kundekontakt will be created on fp-level.
    art: The art of the kundekontakt.
    notat: The text of the kundekontakt.
    lock: A threading.Lock object to allow this function to run properly when multithreaded. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the kundekontakt wasn't created.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.opret_kundekontakt._set_clipboard
documentation:
Private function to set text to the clipboard.

Args:
    text: Text to set to clipboard.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.opret_kundekontakt._confirm_kundekontakt
documentation:
Confirm the kundekontakt was created
Compare the top 10 kundekontakter in the table with the input of this function
Compare date, art and (up to) the first 10 letters of the notat

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.sap_util
documentation: This module provides miscellaneous static functions to perform common tasks in SAP.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.sap_util.print_all_descendants
documentation:
Prints the object and all of its descendants recursively
to the console.

Args:
    container: A SAP GuiContainer object.
    max_depth: The maximum depth of the recursive search. Defaults to -1.
    indent: The indentation level of the printed text.
            This increases for each level of the recursion. Defaults to 0.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.gridview_util
documentation: This module provides static functions to perform common tasks with SAP GuiGridView COM objects.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.gridview_util.scroll_entire_table
documentation:
This function scrolls through the entire table to load all cells.

Args:
    grid_view: A SAP GuiGridView object.
    return_to_top: Whether to return the table to the first row after scrolling. Defaults to False.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.gridview_util.get_all_rows
documentation:
Get all values from a table and return them in a 2D tuple.

Args:
    grid_view: A SAP GuiGridView object.
    pre_load: Whether to first scroll through the table to load all values.
              If a row hasn't been loaded before reading, the row data will be empty.

Returns:
    tuple[tuple[str]]: A 2D tuple of all cell values in the gridview.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.gridview_util.get_row
documentation:
Returns the data of a single row.

Args:
    grid_view: A SAP GuiGridView object.
    row: The zero-based index of the row.
    scroll_to_row: Whether to scroll to the row before reading the data.
                   This ensures the data of the row has been loaded before reading.

Returns:
    tuple[str]: A tuple of the row's data.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.gridview_util.iterate_rows
documentation:
This generator yields each row of the table in order.
This is preferable to loading all rows as this will only load a row when it's needed.
As a side effect this function scrolls the yielded row into view, so the
table doesn't need to be pre-loaded before calling this function.

Args:
    grid_view: A SAP GuiGridView object.

Yields:
    tuple[str]: A tuple of the next row's data.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.gridview_util.get_column_titles
documentation:
Get the column titles of the table instead of the column ids.
To get the column ids use grid_view.ColumnOrder.

Args:
    grid_view: A SAP GuiGridView object.

Returns:
    tuple[str]: A tuple of the gridview's column titles.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.gridview_util.find_row_index_by_value
documentation:
Find the index of the first row where the given column's value
matches the given value. Returns -1 if no row is found.

Args:
    grid_view: A SAP GuiGridView object.
    column: The id of the column.
    value: The value to search for.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the gridview doesn't contain a column with the given id.

Returns:
    int: The index of the first row which column value matches the given value.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.gridview_util.find_all_row_indices_by_value
documentation:
Find all indices of the rows where the given column's value
match the given value. Returns an empty list if no row is found.

Args:
    grid_view (_type_): A SAP GuiGridView object.
    column (str): The name of the column whose value to check.
    value (str): The value to search for.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the column name doesn't exist in the grid view.

Returns:
    list[int]: A list of row indices where the value matches.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.tree_util
documentation: This module provides static functions to perform common tasks with SAP GuiTree COM objects.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.tree_util.get_node_key_by_text
documentation:
Get the node key of a node based on its text.

Args:
    tree: A SAP GuiTree object.
    text: The text to search for.
    fuzzy: Whether to check if the node text just contains the search text.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no node is found with the given text.

Returns:
    str: The node key of the found node.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.tree_util.get_item_by_text
documentation:
Get the node key and item name of an item based on its text.

Args:
    tree: A SAP GuiTree object.
    text: The text to search for.
    fuzzy: Whether to check if the item text just contains the search text.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no tem is found with the given text.

Returns:
    tuple[str,str]: The node key and item name of the found item.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.tree_util.check_all_check_boxes
documentation:
Find and check all checkboxes in the tree.

Args:
    tree: A SAP GuiTree object.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.tree_util.uncheck_all_check_boxes
documentation:
Find and uncheck all checkboxes in the tree.

Args:
    tree: A SAP GuiTree object.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.util
documentation: This module contains helper functions regarding the KMD Nova API.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.util.datetime_from_iso_string
documentation:
A helper function to convert an ISO date string to a datetime.
If the date string is None, None is returned.

Args:
    date_string: A date string in ISO format.

Returns:
    A datetime object representing the date string.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.util.datetime_to_iso_string
documentation:
A helper function to convert a datetime to an ISO formatted string.
If the the datetime is None, None is returned.

Args:
    datetime_: The datetime object to convert.

Returns:
    A datetime string in ISO format.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.sap_login
documentation:
This module provides functions to handle opening and closing SAP Gui
as well as a function to change user passwords.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.sap_login.login_using_cli
documentation:
Open and login to SAP with commandline expressions.
Args:
    username: AZ username
    password: password
    client: Kommune ID (Aarhus = 751). Defaults to '751'.
    system: Environment SID (e.g. P02 = 'KMD OPUS Produktion [P02]'). Defaults to 'P02'.
    timeout: The time in seconds to wait for SAP Logon to start. Defaults to 10.
Raises:
    TimeoutError: If SAP doesn't start within timeout limit.
    ValueError: If SAP is unable to log in using the given credentials.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.sap_login._wait_for_sap_session
documentation:
Check every second if the SAP Gui scripting engine is available until timeout is reached.
Args:
    timeout: The time in seconds to wait for SAP Logon to start. Defaults to 10.
Raises:
    TimeoutError: If SAP doesn't start within timeout limit.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.sap_login._check_for_splash_screen
documentation:
Check if the splash screen image is currently present.
Returns:
    bool: True if the splash screen image is currently present.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.sap_login.change_password
documentation:
Change the password of a user in SAP Gui. Closes SAP when done.
Args:
    username: The username of the user.
    old_password: The current password of the user.
    new_password: The new password to change to.
    client: The client number. Defaults to '751'.
    system: The description string of the connection as displayed in SAP Logon. Defaults to '...KMD OPUS Produktion [P02]'.
    timeout: The time in seconds to wait for SAP Logon to start. Defaults to 10.
Raises:
    TimeoutError: If the connection couldn't be established within the timeout limit.
    ValueError: If the current credentials are not valid or if the password can't be changed.
    ValueError: If the new password is not valid.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.sap_login.kill_sap
documentation: Kills all SAP processes currently running.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova
documentation:
This module provides helper functions to use the KMD Nova api.
The api is documented here: https://novaapi.kmd.dk/swagger/index.html

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.multi_session
documentation:
This module provides static function to handle multiple sessions of SAP.
Using this module you can spawn multiple sessions and automatically execute
a function in parallel on the sessions.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.multi_session.run_with_session
documentation:
Run a function in a specific session based on the sessions index.
This function is meant to be run inside a separate thread.
The function must take a session object as its first argument.
Note that this function will not spawn the sessions before running,
use spawn_sessions to do that.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.multi_session.run_batch
documentation:
Run a function in parallel sessions.
A number of threads equal to the length of args will be spawned.
The function must take a session object as its first argument.
Note that this function will not spawn the sessions before running,
use spawn_sessions to do that.

Args:
    func: A callable function to run in the threads.
    args: A tuple of tuples containing arguments to be passed to func.

Raises:
    Exception: Any exception raised in any of the threads.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.multi_session.run_batches
documentation:
Run a function in parallel batches.
This function runs the input function for each set of arguments in args.
The function will be run in parallel batches of size {num_sessions}.
The function must take a session object as its first argument.
Note that this function will not spawn the sessions before running,
use spawn_sessions to do that.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.multi_session.spawn_sessions
documentation:
A function to spawn multiple sessions of SAP.
This function will attempt to spawn the desired number of sessions.
If the current number of already open sessions exceeds the desired number of sessions
the already open sessions will not be closed to match the desired number.
The number of sessions must be between 1 and 6.

Args:
    num_sessions: The number of sessions desired. Defaults to 6.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the number of sessions is not between 1 and 6.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple of all currently open sessions.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.multi_session.get_all_sap_sessions
documentation:
Returns a tuple of all open SAP sessions (on connection index 0).

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple of SAP GuiSession objects.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.multi_session.arrange_sessions
documentation:
Take all toplevel windows of currently open SAP sessions
and arrange them equally on the screen.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.sap.multi_session.ExThread
documentation: A thread with a handle to get an exception raised inside the thread: ExThread.error

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_documents
documentation:
This module has functions to do with document related calls
to the KMD Nova api.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_documents.get_documents
documentation:
Get all documents attached to the given case.
To get the actual document file use download_document_file.

Args:
    case_uuid: The uuid of the case to get documents from.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    A list of Document objects describing the documents.

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_documents.download_document_file
documentation:
Download the file attached to a KMD Nova Document.

Args:
    document_uuid: The uuid of the Nova document.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.
    checkout: Whether to mark the document as checked out. Defaults to False.
    checkout_comment: A comment to the checkout. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    The document file as raw bytes.

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_documents.upload_document
documentation:
Upload a document to Nova. This only uploads the document file.
To attach the document to a case use attach_document_to_case after calling this.
The uuid returned should be used to create a new Document object.

Args:
    file: The file to upload as a file-like object in binary mode.
    file_name: The name of the file including the file extension.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    The uuid identifying the document in Nova.

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_documents.attach_document_to_case
documentation:
Attach a document to a case in Nova.
The document file first needs to be uploaded using upload_document,
which also creates the document uuid.

Args:
    case_uuid: The uuid of the case to attach the document to.
    document: The document object to attach to the case.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.
    security_unit_id: The id of the security unit that has access to the document. Defaults to 818485.
    security_unit_name: The name of the security unit that has access to the document. Defaults to "Borgerservice".

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects
documentation: This module contains dataclasses relating to KMD Nova cases.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects.Department
documentation: A dataclass representing a department in a KMD Nova case.
All classes in this module are pure dataclasses made to contain data.
pylint: disable=too-many-instance-attributes

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects.Caseworker
documentation: A dataclass representing a caseworker in a KMD Nova case.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects.CaseParty
documentation: A dataclass representing a case party in a KMD Nova case.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects.Document
documentation: A dataclass representing a KMD Nova Document.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects.JournalNote
documentation: A dataclass representing a KMD Nova journal note.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects.Task

class_variables.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects.Task.status_code
documentation: Not Started, Started, Finished
A dataclass representing a KMD Nova task.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_objects.NovaCase
documentation: A dataclass representing a KMD Nova case.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_tasks
documentation:
This module has functions to do with task related calls
to the KMD Nova api.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_tasks.attach_task_to_case
documentation:
Attach a Task object to a case in Nova.

The Task object must have the following values set:
uuid, title, status_code, deadline, case_worker_uuid.

Args:
    case_uuid: The id of the case to attach the task to.
    task: A Task object describing the task.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_tasks.get_tasks
documentation:
Get tasks attached to a case.

Args:
    case_uuid: The id of the case.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.
    limit: The max number of tasks to get. Defaults to 100.

Returns:
    A list of Task objects.

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_tasks._extract_caseworker
documentation:
Extract the case worker from a HTTP request response.

Args:
    case_dict: The dictionary describing the task.

Returns:
    A case worker object describing the case worker if any.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_tasks.update_task
documentation:
Update a task that already exists in KMD Nova with new
information.

Args:
    task: The Task object describing the updated task.
    case_uuid: The id of the case the task belongs to.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.authentication
documentation: This module contains functionality to authenticate against the KMD Nova api.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.authentication.NovaAccess

methods.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.authentication.NovaAccess._get_new_token
documentation:
This method requests a new token from the API.
When the token expiry date is passed, requests with the token to the API will return HTTP 401 status code.

Returns:
    tuple: token and expiry datetime

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

methods.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.authentication.NovaAccess.get_bearer_token
documentation:
Return the bearer token. If the token is about to expire,
a new token is requested form the auth service.

Returns:
   Bearer token
An object that handles access to the KMD Nova api.
pylint: disable-next=too-few-public-methods

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.cpr
documentation:
This module has functions to do with cpr related calls
to the KMD Nova api.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.cpr.get_address_by_cpr
documentation:
Gets the street address of a citizen by their CPR number.

Args:
    cpr: CPR number of the citizen.

Returns:
    A dict with the address information.

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_notes
documentation: This module has functions to do with journal note related calls to the KMD Nova api.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_notes.add_text_note
documentation:
Add a text based journal note to a Nova case.

Args:
    case_uuid: The uuid of the case to add the journal note to.
    note_title: The title of the note.
    note_text: The text content of the note.
    approved: Whether the journal note should be marked as approved in Nova.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    The uuid of the created journal note.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_notes._encode_text
documentation:
Encode a string to a base64 string.
Ensure the base64 string doesn't contain padding by inserting spaces at the end of the input string.
There is a bug in the Nova api that corrupts the string if it contains padding.
The extra spaces will not show up in the Nova user interface.
A necessary hack has been implemented to convert Æ, Ø and Å to ae, oe and aa.

Args:
    string: The string to encode.

Returns:
    A base64 string containing no padding.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_notes.get_notes
documentation:
Get all journal notes from the given case.

Args:
    case_uuid: The uuid of the case to get notes from.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.
    offset: The number of journal notes to skip.
    limit: The maximum number of journal notes to get (1-500).

Returns:
    A tuple of JournalNote objects.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.file
documentation: This module is responsible for accessing files using the Microsoft Graph API.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.file.get_drive_item
documentation:
Given a site id and a drive_item_path, gets the corresponding DriveItem

You need to authorize against Graph to get the GraphAccess before using this function
see the graph.authentication module.

See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/driveitem-get for further documentation

Args:
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.
    site_id: The id of the site in SharePoint.
    drive_item_path: The path to the DriveItem in SharePoint.

Returns:
    DriveItem: A DriveItem object.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.file._unpack_drive_item_response
documentation:
Unpack a json HTTP response and create a DriveItem object.

Args:
    drive_item_raw: The json dictionary created by response.json().

Returns:
    DriveItem: A DriveItem object.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.file.DriveItem
documentation: A class representing a DriveItem.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.common
documentation: This module contains common functions like HTTP request wrappers which are used across other modules.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.common.get_request
documentation:
Sends a get request to the given Graph endpoint using the GraphAccess
and returns the json object of the response.

Args:
    endpoint: The URL of the Graph endpoint.
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    Response: The response object of the GET request.

Raises:
    HTTPError: Any errors raised while performing GET request.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.common.put_request
documentation:
Sends a put request to the given Graph endpoint using the GraphAccess
and returns the json object of the response.

Args:
    endpoint: The URL of the Graph endpoint.
    data: The data to send in the request.
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    Response: The response object of the PUT request.

Raises:
    HTTPError: Any errors raised while performing PUT request.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases
documentation:
This module has functions to do with case related calls
to the KMD Nova api.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases.get_case
documentation:
Get a case from based on its uuid.

Args:
    case_uuid: The uuid of the case to get.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no case was found.

Returns:
    The case with the given uuid.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases.get_cases
documentation:
Search for cases on different search terms.
Currently supports search on cpr number, case number and case title. At least one search term must be given.

Args:
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.
    cpr: The cpr number to search on. E.g. "0123456789"
    case_number: The case number to search on. E.g. "S2022-12345"
    case_title: The case title to search on.
    limit: The maximum number of cases to find (1-500).

Returns:
    A list of NovaCase objects.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no search terms are given.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases.get_cvr_cases
documentation:
Search for cases on different search terms.
Currently supports search on cvr number, case number and case title. At least one search term must be given.

Args:
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.
    cvr: The cvr number to search on. E.g. "01234567"
    case_number: The case number to search on. E.g. "S2022-12345"
    case_title: The case title to search on.
    limit: The maximum number of cases to find (1-500).

Returns:
    A list of NovaCase objects.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no search terms are given.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases._get_nova_cases
documentation:
Search for cases with a payload of search terms.

Args:
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.
    payload: A dictionary containing case identifier, identifier type, case number case title and limit

Returns:
    A list of NovaCase objects.

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases._extract_departments
documentation:
Extract the departments from a HTTP request response.

Args:
    case_dict: The dictionary describing the case.

Returns:
    The security unit and the responsible department.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases._extract_case_worker
documentation:
Extract the case worker from a HTTP request response.
If the case worker is in a unexpected format, None is returned.

Args:
    case_dict: The dictionary describing the case.

Returns:
    A case worker object describing the case worker if any.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases._extract_case_parties
documentation:
Extract the case parties from a HTTP request response.

Args:
    case_dict: The dictionary describing the case party.

Returns:
    A case party object describing the case party.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases._extract_journal_notes
documentation:
Extract the journal notes from a HTTP request response.

Args:
    case_dict: The dictionary describing the journal note.

Returns:
    A journal note object describing the journal note.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.kmd_nova.nova_cases.add_case
documentation:
Add a case to KMD Nova. The case will be created as 'Active'.

Args:
    case: The case object describing the case.
    nova_access: The NovaAccess object used to authenticate.
    security_unit_id: The id of the security unit that has access to the case. Defaults to 818485.
    security_unit_name: The name of the security unit that has access to the case. Defaults to "Borgerservice".

Raises:
    requests.exceptions.HTTPError: If the request failed.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.site
documentation: This module is responsible for accessing sites using the Microsoft Graph API.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.site.get_site
documentation:
Retrieve properties and relationships for a site resource.
A site resource represents a team site in SharePoint.

You need to authorize against Graph to get the GraphAccess before using this function
see the graph.authentication module.

See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/site-get?view=graph-rest-1.0
for a list of possible site_paths to pass as argument.

Args:
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.
    site_path: The path to the team site in SharePoint.

returns:
    A Site object

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.site.download_file_contents
documentation:
Given a site_id, a drive_item_id, and a download destination, downloads a single file from a site resource

You need to authorize against Graph to get the GraphAccess before using this function
see the graph.authentication module.

See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/driveitem-get-content for further documentation

Args:
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.
    site_id: The id of the site in SharePoint.
    drive_item_id: The id of the DriveItem in SharePoint.

returns:
    bytes containing the contents of the file

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.site.upload_file_contents
documentation:
Given a site_id, a drive_item_path, and file_contents as bytes, uploads a single file to a site

You need to authorize against Graph to get the GraphAccess before using this function
see the graph.authentication module.

See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/driveitem-put-content for further documentation

Args:
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.
    site_id: The id of the site in SharePoint.
    drive_item_path: The path to upload the file contents to.
    file_contents: A bytes object containing the file's contents.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.site._unpack_site_response
documentation:
Unpack a json HTTP response and create a Site object.

Args:
    site_raw: The json dictionary created by response.json().

Returns:
    Site: A Site object.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.site.Site
documentation: A class representing a Site.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.authentication
documentation:
This module is responsible for authenticating a Microsoft Graph
connection.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.authentication.authorize_by_username_password
documentation:
Get a bearer token for the given user.
This is used in most other Graph API calls.

Args:
    username: The username of the user (email address).
    password: The password of the user.
    client_id: The Graph API client id in 8-4-4-12 format.
    tenant_id: The Graph API tenant id in 8-4-4-12 format.

Returns:
    GraphAccess: The GraphAccess object used to authorize Graph access.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.authentication.GraphAccess

methods.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.authentication.GraphAccess.get_access_token
documentation:
Get the access token to Graph.
This function automatically reuses an existing token
or refreshes an expired one.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the access token couldn't be acquired.

Returns:
    str: The Graph access token.

An object that handles access to the Graph api.
This object should not be created directly but instead
using one of the authorize methods in the graph.authentication module.
pylint: disable-next=too-few-public-methods

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.address_lookup
documentation:
This module contains functions to look up addresses in DAWA.
https://dawadocs.dataforsyningen.dk/dok/api/

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.address_lookup.search_address
documentation:
Search for an address in the DAWA API.

Args:
    query: The free text to search for.
    street: The exact street of the address.
    number: The exact number of the address.
    postal_code: The exact postal code of the address.
    municipality_code: The exact municipality code of the address.
    results_per_page: The number of results to fetch per page.
    page: The 1-based page of results to fetch.

Returns:
    A list of address objects describing the addresses found.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.address_lookup.Address
documentation: A dataclass representing an address.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail
documentation: This module is responsible for accessing emails using the Microsoft Graph API.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.get_emails_from_folder
documentation:
Get all emails from the specified user and folder.
You need to authorize against Graph to get the GraphAccess before using this function
see the graph.authentication module.

Args:
    user: The user who owns the folder.
    folder_path: The absolute path of the folder e.g. 'Inbox/Economy/May'
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    tuple[Email]: The emails from the given folder.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.get_email_as_mime
documentation:
Get an email as a file-like object in MIME format.

Args:
    email: The email to get as MIME.
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    io.BytesIO: A file-like object of the MIME file.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.get_folder_id_from_path
documentation:
Get the Graph id of a folder based on the path of the folder.
You need to authorize against Graph to get the GraphAccess before using this function
see the graph.authentication module.

Args:
    user: The user who owns the folder.
    folder_path: The absolute path of the folder e.g. 'Inbox/Economy/May'
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.

Raises:
    ValueError: If a folder in the path can't be found.

Returns:
    str: The UUID of the folder in Graph.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.list_email_attachments
documentation:
List all attachments of the given email. This function only gets the id, name and size
of the attachment. Use get_attachment_data to get the actual data of an attachment.

Args:
    email: The email which attachments to list.
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    tuple[Attachment]: A tuple of Attachment objects describing the attachments.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.get_attachment_data
documentation:
Get a file-like object representing the attachment.

Args:
    attachment: The attachment to get.
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.

Returns:
    io.BytesIO: A file-like object representing the attachment.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.move_email
documentation:
Move an email to another folder under the same user.
If well_known_folder is true, the folder path is assumed to be a well defined folder.
See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/resources/mailfolder?view=graph-rest-1.0
for a list of well defined folder names.

Args:
    email: The email to move.
    folder_path: The absolute path to the new folder. E.g. 'Inbox/Economy/May'
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.
    well_known_folder: Whether the path is a 'well known folder'. Defaults to False.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.delete_email
documentation:
Delete an email from the mailbox.
If permanent is true the email is completely removed from the user's mailbox.
If permanent is false the email is instead moved to the Deleted Items folder.

Args:
    email: The email to delete.
    graph_access: The GraphAccess object used to authenticate.
    permanent: Whether to permanently remove the email or not. Defaults to False.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail._find_folder
documentation:
Find the target folder in

Args:
    response: The json dict of the HTTP response.
    target_folder: The folder to find.

Returns:
    str: The id of the target folder.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail._unpack_email_response
documentation:
Unpack a json HTTP response and create a list of Email objects.

Args:
    user: The user who owns the email folder.
    json: The json dictionary created by response.json().

Returns:
    tuple[Email]: A tuple of Email objects.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.Email

methods.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.Email.get_text
documentation:
Get the body as plain text.
If the body is html it's converted to plaintext.
If the body is text it's returned as is.

Returns:
    str: The body as plain text.
A class representing an email.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.graph.mail.Attachment
documentation:
A dataclass representing an email Attachment.
It contains the graph id, name and size of the attachment.
To get the actual data call graph.mail.get_attachment_data.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.file_util
documentation: This module contains helper functions to do with handling files.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.file_util.wait_for_download
documentation:
Wait for a file to appear in a folder.
This checks the folder every second for the file.

Args:
    folder: The absolute path of the folder to monitor.
    file_name: The name of the file if know else None
    file_extension: The file extension of the file with the dot.
    timeout: The number of seconds to wait for the file.

Returns:
    The absolute path to the file.

Raises:
    TimeoutError: If the file didn't appear withing the given timeout.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.file_util.handle_save_dialog
documentation:
Save a file using the default Windows file dialog.
The dialog is assumed to already be open.

Args:
    file_path: The absolute path to save the file at.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cpr_util
documentation: This module contains helper functions regarding cpr numbers.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cpr_util.get_birth_date
documentation:
Get the birth date of a person based on their cpr number
using the 7th digit to infer the century.

Args:
    cpr: The cpr number in the format 'ddmmyyxxxx'.

Returns:
    The birth date based on cpr number.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the given cpr is not in 'ddmmyyxxxx' format.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cpr_util.get_age
documentation:
Get the age of a person based on their cpr number
using the 7th digit to infer the century.

Args:
    cpr: The cpr number in the format 'ddmmyyxxxx'.
    current_date: The date where the age is calculated from. Defaults to the current date.

Returns:
    The age in integer years based on the cpr number.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the given cpr is not in 'ddmmyyxxxx' format.

modules.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cvr_lookup
documentation:
This module has functions related to calls
to the Virk CVR API.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cvr_lookup.cvr_lookup
documentation:
Look up a company based on a CVR number.

Args:
    cvr: The cvr number of the company to look up.
    username: The username to the cvr api.
    password: The password to the cvr api.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no company is found on the given cvr number.
    ValueError: If more than one company is found on the given cvr number.
    RuntimeError: If a company with a different cvr number is found.

Returns:
    A company object describing the found company.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cvr_lookup.cvr_mass_lookup
documentation:
Look up multiple companies based on a list of cvr numbers.

Args:
    cvr_list: The list of cvr numbers to look up.
    match_length: Whether the number results must match the number of inputs.
    username: The username to the cvr api.
    password: The password to the cvr api.

Raises:
    ValueError: If match_length is true and the number of results doesn't match.

Returns:
    A list of company objects describing the found companies.
    The list is sorted to match the input list.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cvr_lookup._unpack_company_dict
documentation:
Unpack a response dict to a company object.

Args:
    company_dict: The company dict from the cvr api.
    cvr: The cvr number of the company.

Returns:
    A company object describing the found company.

functions.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cvr_lookup._parse_address
documentation:
Parse and format the address of a company.

Args:
    address_dict: The dictionary describing the address.

Returns:
    A tuple of address, postal code and city.

classes.name: itk_dev_shared_components.misc.cvr_lookup.Company
documentation: A dataclass representing a company.
